data.body: PS5 fixes done: (1) compute_validity _authoritative_material collapses empty-string material sentinel to None ('' or None) — freshly-signed material-less completion op-cert no longer false-stale; finding-B preserved (still signed-payload sourced), real edits still caught. (2) removed attest.py from module-size-allowlist.txt + module-size-ceilings.txt (now 703 LOC, under 800). Running FULL make test before pushing PS5.
